name: heardle-spotify
description: A reliable Spotify Premium Heardle game.

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run check:api && npm run test:run && npm run build
scripts.check:api: node --check api/_spotify.js && node --check api/status.js && node --check api/login.js && node --check api/callback.js && node --check api/token.js && node --check api/logout.js
